title: Publications | Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Publications Ngā whakaputanga kōrero
- Measuring public health behaviours and intentions Publication date: 12 July 2024 This publication showcases the findings from quantitative research conducted to better understand the drivers of public health behaviours and attitudes during the COVID-19 pandemic and how they have changed over time. Publication COVID-19 Public health Immunisation

## Measuring public health behaviours and intentions
This publication showcases the findings from quantitative research conducted to better understand the drivers of public health behaviours and attitudes during the COVID-19 pandemic and how they have changed over time.
- New Zealand Pandemic Plan: A framework for action Publication date: 12 July 2024 This publication updates the New Zealand Influenza Pandemic Plan: A framework for action 2017 to reflect the health system reforms of 2022. It also incorporates some of the lessons identified during the COVID-19 pandemic response. Publication Emergency management Pandemics Public health

## New Zealand Pandemic Plan: A framework for action
This publication updates the New Zealand Influenza Pandemic Plan: A framework for action 2017 to reflect the health system reforms of 2022. It also incorporates some of the lessons identified during the COVID-19 pandemic response.
- Emergency management
- Position statement from the Ministry of Health on ‘abortion reversal’ Publication date: 11 July 2024 The Ministry of Health does not support or recognise the practice of ‘abortion reversal’ and is concerned about reports that this may be offered in New Zealand. Position statement Abortion

## Position statement from the Ministry of Health on ‘abortion reversal’
The Ministry of Health does not support or recognise the practice of ‘abortion reversal’ and is concerned about reports that this may be offered in New Zealand.
- Evidence synthesis of the research on Suicide Prevention and Postvention; Aotearoa New Zealand and International Perspectives Publication date: 10 July 2024 This publication summarises the most up-to-date and relevant local and international evidence on suicide prevention and postvention. It highlights what the most impactful interventions are for the New Zealand context and where the gaps in the research are. Publication Suicide

## Evidence synthesis of the research on Suicide Prevention and Postvention; Aotearoa New Zealand and International Perspectives
This publication summarises the most up-to-date and relevant local and international evidence on suicide prevention and postvention. It highlights what the most impactful interventions are for the New Zealand context and where the gaps in the research are.
- The New Zealand Illicit Drug Harm Index 2023: Research Report Publication date: 2 July 2024 The 2023 Illicit Drug Harm Index (DHI 2023) provides a comprehensive evaluation of the costs of harmful illicit drug use, updated from the 2020 Illicit Drug Harm Index. Publication Drugs

## The New Zealand Illicit Drug Harm Index 2023: Research Report
The 2023 Illicit Drug Harm Index (DHI 2023) provides a comprehensive evaluation of the costs of harmful illicit drug use, updated from the 2020 Illicit Drug Harm Index.
- Government Policy Statement on Health 2024–2027 Publication date: 30 June 2024 The Government Policy Statement on Health 2024-27 is the public statement of what Government expects the health system to deliver and achieve, and how success will be measured, monitored, and reported. Publication Health system

## Government Policy Statement on Health 2024–2027
The Government Policy Statement on Health 2024-27 is the public statement of what Government expects the health system to deliver and achieve, and how success will be measured, monitored, and reported.
- Hauora Haumi Allied Health Report 2024 Publication date: 27 June 2024 Last updated: 1 April 2026 This report is the first of its kind to collate information about allied health professions in Aotearoa New Zealand and their impact on the health and wellbeing of our population Publication Health system Workforce Allied health

## Hauora Haumi Allied Health Report 2024
This report is the first of its kind to collate information about allied health professions in Aotearoa New Zealand and their impact on the health and wellbeing of our population
- HIV Monitoring Plan: Measuring progress against the National HIV Action Plan for Aotearoa New Zealand 2023-2030 Publication date: 26 June 2024 The HIV Monitoring Plan is a framework to support and measure progress towards achieving the goals and targets of the National HIV Action Plan for Aotearoa New Zealand 2023-2030. Publication Public health Notifiable diseases

## HIV Monitoring Plan: Measuring progress against the National HIV Action Plan for Aotearoa New Zealand 2023-2030
The HIV Monitoring Plan is a framework to support and measure progress towards achieving the goals and targets of the National HIV Action Plan for Aotearoa New Zealand 2023-2030.
- International Approaches to Natural Health Product Regulations Publication date: 21 June 2024 This report outlines and compares regulatory approaches to natural health products (NHPs) in Australia, Canada, the EU, UK, USA and China. It includes specific coverage on the regulation of homeopathy in Germany and Ayurveda in India. Publication Therapeutic products

## International Approaches to Natural Health Product Regulations
This report outlines and compares regulatory approaches to natural health products (NHPs) in Australia, Canada, the EU, UK, USA and China. It includes specific coverage on the regulation of homeopathy in Germany and Ayurveda in India.
- Therapeutic products
- Independent Review of the Alcohol Levy – Stage 2 Publication date: 18 June 2024 The Ministry of Health has published stage two of Allen + Clarke’s independent review of the alcohol levy. Publication Alcohol Public health

## Independent Review of the Alcohol Levy – Stage 2
The Ministry of Health has published stage two of Allen + Clarke’s independent review of the alcohol levy.
- Costs of alcohol harms in New Zealand: Updating the evidence with recent research Publication date: 18 June 2024 In 2023, the Ministry of Health commissioned the New Zealand Institute of Economic Research (NZIER) to conduct an up-to-date analysis of the societal costs of alcohol harm in New Zealand. Publication Alcohol Public health

## Costs of alcohol harms in New Zealand: Updating the evidence with recent research
In 2023, the Ministry of Health commissioned the New Zealand Institute of Economic Research (NZIER) to conduct an up-to-date analysis of the societal costs of alcohol harm in New Zealand.
- Mental Health and Problematic Substance Use Publication date: 10 June 2024 The New Zealand Health Survey (NZHS) included a module on mental health and problematic substance use (including tobacco, alcohol and illicit substance use) in 2016/17, 2021/22 and 2022/23. This report presents information and key results from the mental health and problematic substance use module. Publication Alcohol Drugs Tobacco Mental health

## Mental Health and Problematic Substance Use
The New Zealand Health Survey (NZHS) included a module on mental health and problematic substance use (including tobacco, alcohol and illicit substance use) in 2016/17, 2021/22 and 2022/23. This report presents information and key results from the mental health and problematic substance use module.
- Mental Health and Problematic Substance Use Data Explorer Publication date: 10 June 2024 The Mental Health and Problematic Substance Use Data Explorer presents data covering topics such as mental health, risk of problematic substance use (including tobacco, alcohol and illicit substance use), informal help-seeking and access to mental health and addictions services for adults and children. Publication Alcohol Drugs Tobacco Mental health

## Mental Health and Problematic Substance Use Data Explorer
The Mental Health and Problematic Substance Use Data Explorer presents data covering topics such as mental health, risk of problematic substance use (including tobacco, alcohol and illicit substance use), informal help-seeking and access to mental health and addictions services for adults and children.
- Ngā Paerewa Implementation Evaluation Publication date: 22 May 2024 The Ministry commissioned Malatest International to conduct an independent evaluation of the implementation of Ngā paerewa Health and disability services standard NZS 8134:2021. Publication Certification of health care services

## Ngā Paerewa Implementation Evaluation
The Ministry commissioned Malatest International to conduct an independent evaluation of the implementation of Ngā paerewa Health and disability services standard NZS 8134:2021.
- Certification of health care services
- Interim Government Policy Statement Measures Snapshot Report 2022/23 Publication date: 22 May 2024 The Ministry of Health – Manatū Hauora has developed a snapshot report to monitor the progress the health system is making on delivery against the Interim Government Policy Statement on Health 2022–2024 (iGPS). Publication Health system

## Interim Government Policy Statement Measures Snapshot Report 2022/23
The Ministry of Health – Manatū Hauora has developed a snapshot report to monitor the progress the health system is making on delivery against the Interim Government Policy Statement on Health 2022–2024 (iGPS).
